subject: Fix bash-installer when .kube already exists
commit_message:
Fix bash-installer when .kube already exists

Change-Id: I4944ffffce0890561291b2efa96b1df614f93332
Signed-off-by: Petr Ospalý <p.ospaly@partner.samsung.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-1581

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I don't think we need to make bash solution idempotent.
And we are moving bash version to own branch so any changes could be waited and made only on that branch.

Patch Set 1:

There is no effort to make it idempotent but merely to make it work. I have clean install of infra and kubernetes node and this simply command fails and whole installtion fails because on the install machine I have already a directory called .kube - I can delete it of course - but that is too intrusive and I can forget again in the future and must to rerun the whole installation again - it blocks me now.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

we don't have beijing branch yet (CIMAN-231) and bash installer is 1st choice option now for Beijing, it makes sense to improve it if anyone see where ...
Change has been successfully merged by Michal Ptacek

Patch Set 1:

> There is no effort to make it idempotent but merely to make it
 > work. I have clean install of infra and kubernetes node and this
 > simply command fails and whole installtion fails because on the
 > install machine I have already a directory called .kube - I can
 > delete it of course - but that is too intrusive and I can forget
 > again in the future and must to rerun the whole installation again
 > - it blocks me now.

For sure this is not blocking you, you have the change locally and your testing can continue.
